signals.raw:
Bitcoin surges past $75,000 in mid-April 2026 on institutional ETF inflows, MicroStrategy's 300,000+ BTC accumulation, and regulatory clarity | YES | HIGH confidence**[1]

Bitcoin hit four-week highs above $75,000 by mid-April, breaking key resistance like the 100-day moving average amid record ETF inflows and supply constraints from halving cycles, marking its strongest weekly gain since October.
